subcodes.title: Words to some students, spoken on 1914-10-12
subcodes.first_line: I have been informed that you are leaving today... When the Commission of Inquiry came [in 1904], they made matters difficult for us.
subcodes.first_line_orig: گفتند شما ها امروز میخواهید بروید گفتم پس بروم وداع کنم علی العجاله در تابستان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @mystery of the great reversal, @service to others; to the Cause of God
